author: Ahmed A.
pros: It's easy to set up, works well, and I love the daily automated emails so I don't have to login to the dashboard all the time.
cons: - add a technical SEO audit tool and a website auditor with more than 180 ranking factors (this is available in the Labrika service);

review_title: Hope it will be better in the future
description: Support is friendly and response-times are good. Experience with the software is that it is not used at all due to reporting. My clients would not like it.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The price at the time and the idea of using one tool just for rank tracking and reporting
cons: Reporting, this part is designed very poorly and renders the solution useless for now. They are working on a new reporting module (they say) but the fact that they did not give this part a high priority and went for KW research instead seems to me they lost focus.

review_title: A tool that shows promise but still has a long way to go.
description: Serpwatch could be a great tool if it were to work well. Unfortunately so far the only thing it has caused me is frustration and I can't recommend it to anyone. If in the future they manage to solve all the current problems, I have no doubt that it will be a great keyword tracking tool.
author: Dunia C.
pros: Serpwatch has very attractive functionalities in a keyword tracking tool. I especially like that you can add notes to the position graph and that supposedly, every time Google makes a big update, the Serpwatch graph shows it. This way you can know if the update affected you or not.
cons: This tool has a lot of problems. I have spent days without updating the positions of my keywords even though I have established a daily frequency. The platform is extremely slow and many times it does not load the elements that it is supposed to load, such as the list of keywords or the position graph.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Decent rank tracker, litimited in functionality, but useful for
description: It was decent, but we end up switching to True Ranker since we found a better fit with them.
author: Marco C.
pros: It has an incredible UI and a smooth UX. It's really easy to set up, and great to share reports with clients. Concept wise is a solid tool.
cons: It often didn't deliver precise results. It became time-consuming to update and maintain the keyword group.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great Tool and Trustworthy Rank Tracking System
description: I own several sites, each with over 20,000 KW indexed in Google, and I find it very hard to keep track of them. I chose Serpwatch because it allows me to keep up with the most important ones and have confidence that the data I see is the real thing, without having to check the SERP myself.
author: Claudiu M.
pros: I'm only using the Keyword Tracking Tool, which is all I need.- Easy to use- Nice interface- The dashboard on my mobile phone looks and works fantastic.- I'm a heavy Slack user, and I find the integration with this tool handy and time-saving. - The keyword tracking is accurate. I tried some open-source KW trackers, but if you want a helpful product, you need an established one, like Serpwatch.
cons: - I wish that the app would be a little faster. When I navigate thru all my projects, I feel it's slow. But this can be improved by the Devs.- The keywords calculator can sometimes misfire, showing you the wrong forecast for one of the projects.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Fantastic Rank Tracker for Agencies and SEO Gurus
description: I love the program and the community. The team is very responsive and the product does exactly what it says.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I love the daily checks and analytics for each keyword tracked. I can easily see a chart of my rank over time for each keyword and its comparison to competitors. The last thing I really like is that I can spread my checks out to once a day, once every couple days, or once a month. It makes the keywords go much farther without having to pay more.
cons: I wish there was a slimmed down interface for mobile. It is mobile friendly, but if you have a lot of keywords, it's hard to get an easy glance through them all quickly.

description: I've been using Serpwatch for more than a year and I love it. It's easy to set up different projects for each website and add new keywords. It's also easy to adjust the search engines you want to track and the frequency. I like that I can quickly get a big picture view in the dashboard, and the daily emails notify me of important changes.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I appreciate the automated emails that notify me of important changes in my rankings. That way I don't have to log in and check every day but I can still stay on top of things.
cons: I don't really have any criticisms but I really only use the basic features of rank tracking.

review_title: Advanced Rank Tracker with Daily Update
description: I am really happy with SerpWatch, I use it daily.
author: Sulham S.
pros: First of all, I really like the UX/UI of SerpWatch. It is easy to use and navigate. Secondly, I love that we can manage how frequent we can see the keyword updated, for example, we can manage daily, every 3 days etc. Another part that I really like is the email notification for the updated keywords.
cons: Sometimes it is a bit slow and I cannot add keywords. Sometimes the ranking is not accurate, but it is really rare.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Loving it! Moz better watch out!
description: Using Serpwatch almost daily, I have really enjoyed my experience and sing its praises to anyone looking for a solid rank tracker.
author: Alex P.
pros: Having been an early purchers of Serpwatch, I have enjoyed watching it grow and flourish. I love the clean easy to navigate UX and the stats are displayed in such a way that even clients and see what is going on at first glance.
cons: It is still in its infancy, so as a lot of potential for growth in features and function down the road. Right now, it rocks as a serp rank tracker, but that is about as much as it can do - though it does it very well. Really hoping it develops to be an affordable competitor for Moz, but it is a long road ahead,.

description: Shocking! [SENSITIVE CONTENT] sold it to us after much conversation and promised us it would meet our needs as an enterprise level tool. The reality is that it didn't work, when I requested a refund his response was that they were aware of the issues but didn't want to refund us as they'd had to spend so much to fix the platform!
author: Mike E.
pros: Daily rank tracking was the key feature which attracted us to try this service
cons: It doesnt work. We were unable to export any rank tracking data, it just timed out every time. Data export is core to SEO activity. After a decade in the industry this platform is the first to fail to deliver this essential functionality!

description: I wouldn't recommend it to anyone.
author: Tim K.
pros: Keyword tracking is allright: fill in the keywords, choose a period and auto checks begin.
cons: The software is always slow or many times unreachable. Uptime is one of the most aspects of a keyword tracker. Also: no new additions in 4-5 months time (PDF report is still 'coming soon').
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: We were initially interested in Serpwatch's rank tracking features. It was okay... did the job, but we did face some issues with the platform: slow loading dashboard and inconsistent update schedules.
author: Jonathan N.
pros: Loved Serpwatch's UI - very clean and easy to use. Getting everything set up was a breeze.
cons: There were some inconsistencies with how frequently the data was updated. We had set up daily rank tracking, but it seemed like the keyword ranking data didn't update for every single keyword we had. We had to manually figure out which ones had updated successfully and which ones hadn't. The dashboard was also very slow at times.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Pranami B.
pros: The most effective features are keyword rank tracking and keyword research tools, as these features helps me with the work I perform in my SEO marketing field and these features has helped me alot.
cons: All the features are good and there is n need for any change.

review_title: One of the many rank tracking tools
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Extremely easy to use, minimal time to be spent on setting up
cons: Not enough SERP Analysis features, with Google now rolling out the unlimited scroll in mobile. SERP Analysis becomes even more important.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I bought the highest tier from their Appsumo offer but highly disappointed because the main purpose of the tool is to report rankings and they aren't doing a good job in that.
author: Rohit A.
pros: The interface is good however, they need to provide a feature to mobile users to sort the rankings according to positions in SERP.
cons: Most of the SERP rankings reported aren't correct.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Not Really Bad But Things To Improve
author: Toby S.
pros: SerpWatch has a nice interface to track all keywords of your clients. You can configure various update frequencies and alerts if there are any major position changes.
cons: Sometimes the position updating gets stuck for several days. Although the SERP screenshots are not available since a while ago. These things need to get fixed to get 5-stars.

review_title: Solid serp software at a solid price
description: Overall not bad and for keyword tracking pretty good value for the plan.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Clean and simple UI/UX and easy to set up plus implement.
cons: Lack of backlink building and other SEO features most other SAAS provide with their service.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
